## Key DwC fields to include: Event

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Event core (mandatory fields)**

- `eventID` — <span class="small-note">unique, stable ID</span>
- `eventDate` — <span class="small-note">YYYY-MM-DD</span>
- `decimalLatitude`, `decimalLongitude`  
::: 
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Event table (strongly recommended fields)**

- `minimumDepthInMeters`, `maximumDepthInMeters` 
- `sampleSizeValue` <span class="small-note">(volume of sample)</span>  
- `sampleSizeUnit` <span class="small-note">(units of volume sampled)</span> 
- `samplingProtocol` - <span class="small-note">(link to your field sampling SOP)</span>

:::
::::
